ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the auto-detected path to boofa-sketch. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH and Homebrew locations.
ast.target: 覆盖自动检测到的boofa-sketch路径。留空以从PATH和Homebrew位置自动检测。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义二进制文件路径

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Helper not found, run: brew install wasmir/tap/boofa-sketch
ast.target: 未找到助手，请运行：brew install wasmir/tap/boofa-sketch

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Continuity Sketch: this plugin only works on macOS
ast.target: 连续性草图：此插件仅适用于macOS

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
boofa-sketch not found.
Install with: brew install wasmir/tap/boofa-sketch
https://github.com/wasmir/boofa-sketch

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在等待来自设备的草图…

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin only works on macOS and requires the boofa-sketch helper.
ast.target: 此插件仅适用于macOS，并且需要boofa-sketch助手。
